title: External Repo Preflight Command Pack
forbiddenCommands: deploy / gcloud deploy / docker build / docker push

gitSafetyCheck.note: git write operations require explicit じゅんやさん YES

checkItems: Confirm .env is NOT in git staging
Confirm no API keys in edited files
Confirm no OAuth tokens in code
secretSafetyCheck.note: Manual check required. No automated secret scanning.

backupRecommendation.step1: Cloud Shell / PowerShell: save current terminal session log
backupRecommendation.step2: git stash (if any local changes) before starting
backupRecommendation.step3: Note current git log --oneline -3 output as baseline
backupRecommendation.step4: Keep rollback note ready: git checkout -- <file> for each changed file
backupRecommendation.note: No automated backup. Human confirmation required before any destructive action.

recommendedNextAction: Preflight pack ready. Human reviews commands, executes in Cloud Shell / PowerShell, then proceeds to execution prompt.
note: このpacketは実コマンドを実行しない。コマンド候補のみ出力する。実行はじゅんやさんYES後に人間が行う。
